rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CHARLES L. JONES
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Neither a petition for final distribution nor a petition for approval of a report of status of administration has been filed. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 10th Amended General Order which took effect on 06/28/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ERIK MICHAEL BENGTSSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: admin continuance to 1/10/2022. Examiner pulled off file review by Director for special project. Endorsed-filed single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. Examiners will not review any document until after it has been filed and a courtesy copy has been received. [LRSF 2.7, 14.7]. Courtesy copies dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays.

Endorsed-filed single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. Examiners will not review any document until after it has been filed and a courtesy copy has been received. [LRSF 2.7, 14.7]. rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KALVIN M. MA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 1/31/22. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: No courtesy copies. No proposed order. [LRSF 2.7 B., 14.7 A., B., and C., and 14.60 E.] An amending pleading requires the same notice as the pleading it amends, including publication. [CRC 7.53(a).] No proof of service or proof of publication of the amended petition has been filed. Item 6f does NOT appear to be the FIRST box that applies if the decedent's siblings survived. Who are/were the decedent's parents through whom these siblings take? They must be identified and, if they are deceased, their dates of death must be set forth. [LRSF 14.18 C.3.] Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues and the proposed order must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 1/21/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KINUE Y. SMITH
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: continued to 1/3/22. there is a responsive declaration in the efiling queue, but it is signed and verified by the attorney, and the exception that allows an attorney to sign and verify on behalf of a client does not apply when that client is seeking to be appointed as a fiduciary in the proceeding (CRC 7.103(c)). a new supplement must be filed that is signed and verified by the petitioner (per original instructions). new filing deadline (note, uploading is not the same as filing) is noon on 12/27/21.
